description: Swarm Admin UI - Human-friendly web console for viewing Conductor plans, task ownership, discussion consensus, and limited stop/delete controls.

userStories.title: Add safe delete metadata to Swarm records
userStories.description: As a developer, I need safe delete metadata on Swarm records so that deleted Swarms can disappear from default lists without losing audit data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a deleted marker such as `deleted_at` to persisted Swarm metadata or registry entries
Swarm list and status loaders exclude deleted Swarms by default and support an `include_deleted` flag
Safe delete leaves board, artifact, signal, and discussion files intact
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add admin stop and delete mutations
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want backend stop and delete actions so that the UI can stop a running Swarm or safely delete a finished one.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a stop action that stops Conductor and Worker execution for running or blocked Swarms and records the operation time
Add a delete action that only allows non-running Swarms and performs safe delete semantics
Delete action returns a validation error when called for a running Swarm
Both actions return updated Swarm state for the UI
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Swarm overview read model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an overview read model so that the admin overview page can render Swarm summaries without reading low-level board files in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a read model that returns `swarm_id`, goal summary, conductor label, status, current phase, and last updated time for each Swarm
Include task counts for pending, running, blocked, failed, and completed states
Include discussion counts for active, consensus, and no-consensus discussions
Add `needs_attention` and attention reasons derived from blocked task, failed task, stale worker, or no-consensus discussion state
Support overview filters for status, `include_deleted`, and `needs_attention`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Conductor detail read model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Conductor-focused detail read model so that the detail page can show plan and risk information before lower-level execution details.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a detail aggregator that returns goal, current phase, `plan_summary`, `risk_summary`, and last Conductor decision time for one Swarm
`plan_summary` and `risk_summary` prefer Conductor `decision`, `summary`, or `proposal` artifacts when present
When Conductor artifacts are missing, generate fallback summary fields deterministically from tasks, recent signals, and discussion state without using page-time LLM calls
Return the latest five structured Conductor actions for timeline rendering
Return explicit empty-state fields when no Conductor plan data is available
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create task and agent detail read models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need task and agent read models so that the admin detail page can show ownership, activity, and blockage data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a task read model that returns task id, summary, type, status, blockedBy, assignee, created time, updated time, and blocked reason
Support task filters for assignee, status, and type
Add an agent read model that returns role or agent name, `session_id`, status, task count, recent activity time, current task, and recent progress summary
Include linkable identifiers for task-to-assignee and agent-to-task or discussion navigation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create discussion summary and thread read models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need discussion read models so that the admin UI can show consensus summaries by default and raw records on demand.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a discussion summary read model that returns channel or topic, current round, `max_rounds`, participants, tally, and `consensus_state`
Generate `conflict_summary` fields that capture supporters, objectors, modify positions, and main disagreement points
Add raw thread data grouped by round with source labels for `signal`, `artifact`, `summary`, and `decision` entries
Include stable references from summary items to originating role and round entries
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build Swarm overview page
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want an overview page so that I can scan all Swarms, filter them, and open the one I need to inspect.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a web overview page that renders Swarm rows or cards from the overview read model
Show status, current phase, conductor label, updated time, task counts, and discussion counts for each Swarm
Add filters for `All`, `Running`, `Blocked`, `Failed`, `Completed`, and `Deleted` plus a `Needs Attention` filter
Blocked and failed Swarms have distinct visual treatment and each overview item links to its detail page
Deleted Swarms only appear when the deleted filter is enabled
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build detail page shell and Conductor panel
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want the Conductor summary at the top of the detail page so that I can understand the plan before reading tasks and logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Swarm detail page shell with sections or tabs for `Conductor`, `Tasks`, `Agents`, and `Discussions`
Render the Conductor panel above lower-level panels on initial load
Show goal, current phase, `plan_summary`, `risk_summary`, last decision time, and latest actions in the Conductor panel
When plan data is missing, render the empty-state copy from the read model instead of a blank area
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build task panel UI
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want a task panel so that I can inspect task status, dependencies, and ownership for a Swarm.
acceptanceCriteria: Render task rows with task id, summary, type, status, assignee, blocked reason, and updated time
Add task filters for assignee, status, and type
Show task dependency information as relation labels, a tree, or equivalent linked detail state
Allow navigation from a task row to the related assignee context
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build agent panel UI
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want an agent panel so that I can see who is working, blocked, or failed and what each agent owns.
acceptanceCriteria: Render Conductor and Worker rows with role or agent name, `session_id`, status, task count, recent activity time, current task, and recent progress summary
Blocked and failed agents have distinct visual treatment
Each agent row links to related tasks and discussions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build discussion summary panel UI
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want discussion summaries by default so that I can understand consensus state without reading every raw message.
acceptanceCriteria: Render discussion items with topic or channel, round progress, participant list, tally, and `consensus_state`
Default each discussion item to a summary view that shows conflict or consensus information instead of raw text
Show distinct badges for `consensus`, `partial_consensus`, and `no_consensus` states
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build discussion raw record drilldown UI
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want optional raw record drilldown so that I can audit a discussion only when I need the original details.
acceptanceCriteria: Add an expand or collapse control for each discussion that reveals raw records grouped by round
Raw entries show source labels for `signal`, `artifact`, `summary`, and `decision`
Raw record sections are collapsed by default on first load
Summary items can jump to the originating round or role entry when expanded
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build stop and delete controls in the UI
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want guarded stop and delete controls so that I can intervene safely without gaining full edit capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a `Stop Swarm` control that appears for running or blocked Swarms and opens a confirmation dialog before submitting
Add a `Delete Swarm` control that appears only for non-running Swarms and requires a second confirmation before submitting
After a safe delete, the Swarm disappears from the default overview and remains visible under the deleted filter
The UI does not expose controls for editing plan, tasks, discussions, or agent assignments
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add realtime refresh and degraded states
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want pages to refresh and degrade gracefully so that I can trust the admin UI during active or partially broken Swarms.
acceptanceCriteria: Overview and detail pages refresh through the existing polling or event-driven mechanism without requiring a full page reload
When read-model data is partial or missing, overview and detail pages render fallback states instead of crashing
Attention badges update when a Swarm becomes blocked, failed, stale, or no-consensus
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
